git status
git commit -m "wip"
git checkout main
git push origin main
git pull --rebase
GIT log --oneline
docker ps
docker compose up -d
docker ps
docker build -t app .
ls -la
cd ~/code/personal
grep -rn TODO .
kubectl get pods
kubectl get pods -A
git status
terraform plan
terraform apply
git rebase -i HEAD~3
npm run build
